failures.description: The Executor misread or ignored the ProductCatalogSearch result showing one matching item priced at $46.13 and incorrectly answered that no items matched.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to identify available beginner Jigsaw Puzzles costing more than $45.76. The agent correctly planned and called ProductCatalogSearch. The relevant tool output at index 3 returned one matching item with price 46.13, which is greater than 45.76. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite conclusion, saying no items match. This directly contradicts the tool result and was not resolved later.
